title: Tooltip Fade Animation

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Tooltip Fade Animation
text: Create a tooltip that fades in when the user hovers over a button and fades out when they move away. The tooltip should have a dark background and be displayed on top of the button.
requirements
1. Add an HTML button with a tooltip that fades in on hover.
2. Use Tailwind CSS classes to style the tooltip and button.
3. Write JavaScript code to animate the tooltip's opacity on hover.

constraints: Use only HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.

starterCode.html:
index.html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Tooltip Fade Animation</title>
    <script src="script.js" defer></script>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css">
  </head>
  <body>
    <button class="bg-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-900 text-white font-bold py-2 px-4 rounded">Hover me!</button>
  </body>
</html>

gradingCriteria.description: Tooltip fades in when button is hovered over
Tooltip fades out when button is moved away
Tooltip is displayed on top of the button
Tooltip animation is implemented using JavaScript
